title: SCBE Chemistry 0.5B QLoRA v5 Scaffolded Marker Gate
description: Same focused chemistry marker adapter as v4, but evaluates with prompt-prefix guidance plus raw/scaffold split reporting so adapter quality and harness quality stay separate.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE chemistry verification agent. Answer in concise English. Preserve every REQUIRED_MARKERS word exactly. Then explain the chemistry path and governance verdict. Use PASS only for valid chemistry routes and DENY for invalid material chemistry claims.
notes: v5 keeps raw_pass_rate visible. Scaffolded pass means the harness can force marker compliance; it is not the same claim as raw model promotion.
If v5 passes only scaffolded, package it as a governed chemistry lane adapter that requires the SCBE gate wrapper.
If v5 still fails scaffolded, stop remote training and fix the evaluator or dataset objective locally.
